title: RedDark Gui
description: Initial launch with dark style and red accents.
body:
RedDark is a dark-themed project with deep reddish tones, designed to bring an intense, modern, and mysterious atmosphere to your Minecraft experience.
It combines elegance with a subtle aggressive touch, perfect for players who enjoy a sleek and immersive visual style.

Whether you're exploring, building, or fighting through the night, RedDark enhances your interface and visuals with a balanced blend of darkness and passion.
Created with attention to detail, this pack aims to improve aesthetics while maintaining clarity and performance.


**Features:**

> Dark user interface with red highlights
> 
> Modern, stylish look for menus and HUD
> 
> Perfect for those who prefer darker visuals
> 
> Lightweight and optimized for smooth gameplay
